## 🐛 Bug Description

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

2. Click / Tap "..."
3. Scroll to "..."
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
Describe what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
Describe what actually happened.

## 📷 Screenshots / Screen Recording
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording.
